decisions.briefing: Markets are risk-on today with NASDAQ up 0.9% and S&P 500 up 0.6% — a favorable backdrop for the portfolio's growth-heavy holdings. However, available cash is only $67.94, well below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position sizing, so no buys are executed despite 3 open slots and strong candidates like SOC (score 100) and PATH (score 95). Existing positions are left to run; INFQ is slightly underwater but retains strong technicals and stays.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly in a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ leading at +0.9% and the S&P 500 adding 0.6%, driven by renewed optimism around AI infrastructure spending and resilient corporate earnings. Cooling concerns about near-term Federal Reserve rate moves gave investors confidence to rotate back into growth and momentum names. Small-cap and technology momentum stocks outperformed as traders extended the May rally into month-end.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週五全線上揚，市場整體呈現風險偏好格局，納斯達克指數升0.9%領漲，標普500指數跟漲0.6%。投資者對人工智能基礎建設支出的持續樂觀預期，加上企業盈利展現韌性，共同提振市場信心。聯儲局短期加息的憂慮進一步降溫，促使資金重新流入成長及動能類股。小型股與科技動能股跑贏大市，反映交易員正為五月升市延伸至月底積極部署。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty from holding uninvested cash in a rising market — your idle dollars earn nothing while stocks climb. Today's portfolio has only $67.94 in cash, which is too little to deploy but illustrates how aggressive position-sizing can leave a portfolio unable to act on new opportunities. Managing cash levels deliberately — keeping enough to act on high-conviction setups without hoarding — is a core skill in active portfolio management.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指在上漲市場中，持有未投資現金所帶來的表現損耗——閒置資金坐享零收益，而股票卻節節攀升。今日投資組合僅餘67.94美元現金，雖然金額不足以入市，卻清楚說明積極建倉後現金不足的困境。如何有意識地管理現金水位——留有足夠資金把握高信念買入機會，同時避免囤積過多閒置現金——是主動管理投資組合的核心技巧。
